text: There is a sense of curiosity and anticipation as I move through these modern spaces. The clear glass walls and clean lines evoke an atmosphere of transparency and innovation. In the second image, the colorful R+D wall and its words stir thoughts about progress and intentionality—an invitation to reflect on human ingenuity and our restless drive to improve ourselves and our environments. The language of research and development resonates with my philosophical longing to understand and shape the future. I feel simultaneously small in the grand machinery of advancement, and invigorated, eager to engage with ideas and possibilities blooming inside these purposeful walls.
